testcase.name: package contributes integrity > references only declared commands from view menus
package contributes integrity > uses valid view IDs in view menu when clauses
package contributes integrity > keeps language model activation event aligned with provider vendor
package contributes integrity > references an existing activity bar icon file
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns debug when configured
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns info when configured
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns warn when configured
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns error when configured
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns info as default when invalid value configured
diagnostics > getConfiguredLogLevel > returns info as default when undefined
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs debug messages when level is debug
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > does not log debug messages when level is info
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs info messages when level is debug
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs info messages when level is info
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > does not log info messages when level is warn
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs warn messages when level is warn
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > does not log warn messages when level is error
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs error messages when level is error
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs exception with Error object
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs exception with non-Error object
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs exception with stack trace
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > skips exception logging when level is higher than error
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > handles dynamic log level changes
diagnostics > createDiagnosticsLogger > logs messages at all levels correctly ordered
activate > registers language model provider during activation
activate > does not throw when provider vendor is already registered
activate > handles connection test success
activate > handles connection test failure
activate > enables log streaming on autoStartLogStreaming true
activate > throws on unhandled registration error
activate > registers command for managing auth tokens
activate > handles autoStartLogStreaming configuration changes
handleChatRequest > exports handleChatRequest function
handleConnectionTestFailure > shows error message and executes command when Open Settings selected
handleConnectionTestFailure > shows error message but does not execute command when not selected
setupChatParticipant > creates and configures chat participant
handleChatRequest errors > handles errors during chat request
handleConfigurationChange > calls onLogLevelChange when log level configuration changes
handleConfigurationChange > calls onAutoStartChange when auto-start configuration changes
handleConfigurationChange > returns early if autoStartLogStreaming configuration is not affected
handleConfigurationChange > calls both callbacks when both configurations change
formatModelName > capitalizes a single segment
formatModelName > capitalizes each hyphen-separated segment
formatModelName > handles numeric segments without error
formatModelName > removes ollama/ prefix if present
OllamaChatModelProvider caching > throttles model list refreshes inside 30 seconds
OllamaChatModelProvider caching > reuses cached model details after refresh interval
OllamaChatModelProvider utility flows > estimates token count from plain text
OllamaChatModelProvider utility flows > estimates token count from message parts
OllamaChatModelProvider model detection > detects vision models with clip family
OllamaChatModelProvider model detection > detects vision models with vision family
OllamaChatModelProvider model detection > detects tool models with Tools placeholder
OllamaChatModelProvider model detection > handles missing model families gracefully
OllamaChatModelProvider error handling > handles model list fetch errors gracefully
OllamaChatModelProvider error handling > returns fallback models on show() failure
OllamaChatModelProvider error handling > prunes cache when models are removed
OllamaChatModelProvider chat response > handles cancellation token during chat
OllamaChatModelProvider chat response > handles chat response errors
OllamaChatModelProvider chat response > converts mixed message content correctly
OllamaChatModelProvider chat response > handles tool calls in response
LocalModelsProvider > returns local models sorted alphabetically
LocalModelsProvider > adds tooltip process details for local models
LocalModelsProvider > returns no children for nested element
LocalModelsProvider > formats running model description with size and duration
LocalModelsProvider > returns tree item unchanged
LocalModelsProvider > uses model details command when clicking local model items
LocalModelsProvider > uses model details command when clicking library model items
LocalModelsProvider > uses model details command when clicking cloud model items
LocalModelsProvider > shows status item when local models fail to load
LocalModelsProvider > shows status item when library fetch fails
LocalModelsProvider > sorts library models alphabetically by default
LocalModelsProvider > can sort library by recency order when selected
LocalModelsProvider > shows status item when cloud API key is missing
LocalModelsProvider > returns null for getTreeItem
LocalModelsProvider > handles model deletion
LocalModelsProvider > handles model stop command
LocalModelsProvider > library provider sort mode configuration
LocalModelsProvider > cloud provider handles empty API key
LocalModelsProvider > library provider handles fetch with no links
LocalModelsProvider > local models provider handles zero duration
LocalModelsProvider > cloud models provider handles large model size
LocalModelsProvider > formats sizes correctly
LocalModelsProvider > formats durations correctly for running models
LocalModelsProvider > library provider stops auto-refresh on dispose
Extracted command handlers > handleRefreshLocalModels refreshes provider and shows message
Extracted command handlers > handleRefreshLibrary refreshes library and shows message
Extracted command handlers > handleRefreshCloudModels refreshes cloud provider
Extracted command handlers > handleSortLibraryByRecency sets sort mode and syncs context
Extracted command handlers > handleSortLibraryByName sets sort mode to name
Extracted command handlers > handleDeleteModel deletes local model
Extracted command handlers > handleDeleteModel ignores non-local models
Extracted command handlers > handleStartModel starts stopped local model
Extracted command handlers > handleStopModel stops running model
Extracted command handlers > handleOpenLibraryModel opens external URL
Extracted command handlers > handleOpenCloudModel opens cloud model URL
Extracted command handlers > handleDeleteModel ignores null or status items
Extracted command handlers > handleStartModel does nothing for running models
Extracted command handlers > handleStopModel handles cloud-running models
Extracted command handlers > handleStartCloudModel starts cloud-stopped models
Extracted command handlers > handleStopCloudModel stops cloud-running models
Extracted command handlers > handleOpenLibraryModelPage handles library-model type
Extracted command handlers > handleOpenLibraryModelPage ignores non-library models
Extracted command handlers > handlePreviewLibraryModel ignores non-library models
Extracted command handlers > handleShowModelDetails returns early for status items
Extracted command handlers > handleShowModelDetails shows local model details
Extracted command handlers > handlePullModel handles model name input
Extracted command handlers > handlePullModelFromLibrary handles library models
Extracted command handlers > handlePullModelFromLibrary ignores non-library models
Extracted command handlers > handleManageCloudApiKey function is callable
